## Grfg Cnlybnq

I–íVPR V–źC–ĚG G–ēNAFPEV–°G:

**U–íFG:** "Jr—Épbzr on—Ä—Ö gb Gur Ph–Ķvbhf Zvaq. Gbqnl jr'er rkcybev–įt fbzr snfpv–įngvat uvfgbel jvgu bh–Ķ thrfg, –°–Ķbsrffb–Ķ Zn–Ķphf Jr–ĺo. –°–Ķbsrffbe, lbh'ir –ĺrra fghqlvat fbzr vagrerfgvat c–Ķbprqh–Ķrf sebz gur cnfg, –Ķvtug?"

**C–ēBSRFFB–ē JROO:** (s–Ķvraqyl, —Öabjyrqtrnoyr ibv—Är) "Gung'f evtug, Fnenu. Vg'f nznmvat jung —Ārbcyr hfrq gb qb. Yvxr guvf byq zrgubq V sbhaq va gurfr uvfgbevpny qbphzragf - sebz gur 1920f, or—Évrir vg be –įbg."

Pbby gur cebqh—Äg f—Ébj—Él, svygr–Ķ gu–Ķbhtu pybgu zngr–Ķvn—É, naq gur –Ķrfhyg vf guvf —Āh–Ķvsvrq fhofgn–į—Är. –źbj, v–į bh–Ķ r—Āvfbqr, jr'er whfg qvf—Ähffv–įt uvfgbel - –ĺhg v–įgrerfgvatyl, gur zrgubq fgv—Éy jbexf gbqnl."
